title: Lean Governance 2.0: Structural Overhaul
description: Simplify governance workflows by unifying commands, reducing redundancy, and introducing maintenance mode.

phases.title: Core Governance Restructuring
phases.description: Unify gatekeeper-workflow commands and simplify plan resolution.

phases.title: Maintenance Mode Implementation
phases.description: Add support for unplanned commits via the Maintenance trailer.

phases.title: Documentation Alignment
phases.description: Update all governance and workflow documentation to reflect the new processes.
